name: AS-REP Roasting - TGT Request Without Pre-Authentication
description: Detects AS-REP Roasting by identifying AS-REQ TGT requests (4768) with RC4 encryption and no pre-authentication. Covers Rubeus asreproast, Impacket GetNPUsers, and manual approaches.
query: (event.code: "4768" and winlog.event_data.TicketEncryptionType: "0x17" and winlog.event_data.PreAuthType: "0" and winlog.event_data.Status: "0x0" and not winlog.event_data.TargetUserName: *$) or (event.code: "4768" and winlog.event_data.Status: "0x6")
